description_en: National mission for financial inclusion to ensure access to financial services such as banking, savings, deposit accounts, remittance, credit, insurance, pension.

eligibility_criteria.additional: Indian citizen without a bank account

benefit_description: Zero-balance savings account with RuPay debit card, ₹1 lakh accident insurance, ₹30,000 life cover, overdraft facility up to ₹10,000 after 6 months.

name_en: Ayushman Bharat - PM Jan Arogya Yojana
name_hi: आयुष्मान भारत - प्रधानमंत्री जन आरोग्य योजना
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
description_en: World's largest health insurance scheme providing coverage up to ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.

eligibility_criteria.additional: Based on SECC 2011 data or state-specific criteria

benefit_description: Cashless hospitalization up to ₹5 lakh per family per year at empanelled hospitals. Covers pre and post hospitalization expenses.

description_en: Housing for All mission providing financial assistance to rural households to construct pucca houses with basic amenities.

eligibility_criteria.additional: Beneficiary should not own a pucca house

benefit_description: ₹1.20 lakh in plains and ₹1.30 lakh in hilly states for house construction. MGNREGA labour support of 90-95 days. Sanitation support under SBM.

ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description_en: Housing for All in urban areas providing interest subsidy on home loans and direct financial assistance for construction.

eligibility_criteria.additional: Beneficiary or family should not own a pucca house anywhere in India

benefit_description: Interest subsidy up to 6.5% on home loans for EWS (up to ₹6L loan), LIG (up to ₹6L loan), MIG-I (₹9L loan), MIG-II (₹12L loan).

ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description_en: Income support of ₹6,000 per year to all eligible farmer families having cultivable land up to 2 hectares.

eligibility_criteria.additional: Small and marginal farmers with cultivable land

benefit_description: ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments of ₹2,000 every four months directly to bank account.

name_en: NSAP - Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme
name_hi: एनएसएपी - इंदिरा गांधी राष्ट्रीय विधवा पेंशन योजना
description_en: Monthly pension to BPL widows to provide social security and reduce economic vulnerability.

eligibility_criteria.additional: Widow aged 40-79 years belonging to BPL household

benefit_description: ₹300 per month from Centre (states add additional amount, total typically ₹500-1000/month depending on state).

description_en: Accident insurance scheme offering accidental death and disability cover at just ₹20 per year.
benefit_description: ₹2 lakh for accidental death or total permanent disability. ₹1 lakh for partial permanent disability. Premium only ₹20/year.

name_en: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
description_en: Life insurance scheme providing renewable one year life cover for death due to any reason.
benefit_description: ₹2 lakh life cover for death due to any reason. Premium ₹436/year auto-debited from bank account.

ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
description_en: Free LPG connections to women from Below Poverty Line households to reduce dependence on traditional fuels.

eligibility_criteria.additional: Should not have an LPG connection in household

benefit_description: Free LPG connection with deposit waiver. First cylinder and stove provided free or at subsidized cost. Refill subsidy.

name_en: PM Scholarship Scheme for SC/ST Students
name_hi: एससी/एसटी छात्रों के लिए पीएम छात्रवृत्ति योजना
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description_en: Scholarship for SC/ST students pursuing higher education to prevent dropout due to financial constraints.
benefit_description: ₹7,800 to ₹12,000 per year for boys and girls respectively pursuing post-matric courses. Covers tuition, hostel, and other expenses.

description_en: Providing micro finance to small and micro businesses to help them grow and create employment.
benefit_description: Shishu: Up to ₹50,000. Kishore: ₹50,001 to ₹5 lakh. Tarun: ₹5,00,001 to ₹10 lakh. No collateral required for Shishu.

ministry: Department of Financial Services, Ministry of Finance
description_en: Facilitating bank loans between ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore to at least one SC or ST borrower and one woman borrower per bank branch.

eligibility_criteria.additional: For greenfield enterprise in manufacturing, services or trading sector

benefit_description: Composite loan ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore covering 75% of project cost. Repayment period up to 7 years. Includes working capital.

description_en: Pension scheme focused on unorganized sector workers providing guaranteed monthly pension after age 60.

eligibility_criteria.additional: Not a member of any statutory social security scheme

benefit_description: Guaranteed pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 per month after age 60 based on contribution. Government co-contributes 50% for eligible beneficiaries.

name_hi: ओबीसी छात्रों के लिए प्री-मैट्रिक छात्रवृत्ति
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description_en: Scholarship to OBC students studying in Class 9 and 10 to support continued education.
benefit_description: ₹4,500 for day scholars and ₹7,000 for hostellers per year. Covers books, stationery, and hostel charges.

ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
description_en: Holistic support to artisans and craftspeople who work with their hands and tools across 18 traditional trades.

eligibility_criteria.additional: Must be engaged in one of 18 traditional trades: blacksmith, goldsmith, potter, carpenter, weaver, etc.

benefit_description: ₹15,000 toolkit incentive. Skill training with stipend of ₹500/day. Collateral-free loan: ₹1 lakh (first tranche), ₹2 lakh (second tranche) at 5% interest. PM Vishwakarma certificate.
